macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Indian Markets Rally for Third Day as Nifty50 Surpasses 23,650
items.summary: India's Nifty50 index opened above 23,650 and was trading at 23,683.15 (up 0.43%), while BSE Sensex gained over 300 points to 76,389.62 (up 0.42%). The rally continues despite Middle East tensions, supported by crude oil stabilizing around $102 and portfolio rotation toward telecom, pharmaceuticals, and defense stocks.

items.title: US Futures Decline Ahead of Federal Reserve Policy Meeting
items.summary: US stock market index futures fell in early trading, with Dow futures down 0.22%, S&P 500 futures down 0.30%, and Nasdaq futures down 0.39%. The declines come as the Federal Reserve begins a two-day policy meeting amid concerns over elevated oil prices and Middle East tensions.

items.title: US Markets Close Higher Despite Fed Meeting and Oil Price Concerns
items.summary: US equity markets closed with gains led by travel-related stocks including Delta Air Lines, signaling investor resilience despite the Federal Reserve's two-day policy meeting and ongoing Middle East tensions affecting crude oil prices.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Shows Strength Amid Market Uncertainty and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin hit $76,000 overnight and is decoupling from traditional assets, displaying bullish momentum with potential for a 26% rise based on historical triple divergence patterns. Analysts note it's holding firm through macro pressures ahead of FOMC.

items.title: Mastercard Acquires Stablecoin Startup BVNK
items.summary: Mastercard is acquiring BVNK, a stablecoin firm, as Wall Street players like Citibank increase involvement in crypto. This move highlights growing traditional finance integration with blockchain payments.

items.title: Bitcoin Outperforms Assets During Iran War Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin is up around 13% this month, acting as a potential safe haven amid rising oil prices and geopolitical risks from Iran. Flows into Bitcoin are surging despite broader market volatility.

items.title: Potential Bitcoin Trap Ahead of March 18 FOMC Decision
items.summary: Analysts warn of a possible Bitcoin price trap by March 18, with key levels to watch amid expectations of steady US interest rates. Altcoins like ETH, SOL, and SUI face resistance amid stock market updates.

items.title: Ethereum Confirms Breakout but Faces Short-Term Pressure
items.summary: Ethereum is technically confirming a daily breakout, though short-term challenges persist alongside Solana struggling at resistance. Bitcoin's price squeeze is over for now, per analysts.

items.title: Significant Bitcoin Accumulation by Institutions
items.summary: Institutions are buying around $200 million in Bitcoin daily, outpacing miner production by 3-4x, supporting price above key supports like the bull market band.
items.source: YouTube (What They're Not Telling You About Bitcoin)

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Niv-AI Emerges from Stealth with $12M Funding for GPU Optimization
items.summary: Niv-AI has secured $12 million in funding to develop sensors and data analytics that optimize GPU power usage in data centers, enhancing efficiency for advanced AI models.

items.title: Google Research Hires AI Scientist from Isomorphic Labs
items.summary: Google Research has recruited Benedek Rozemberczki from Alphabet's Isomorphic Labs to its OMEGA Algorithms team, bringing expertise in graph machine learning and AI for drug discovery.

items.title: University of Minnesota AI Model Boosts Flood Forecasting Accuracy
items.summary: New knowledge-guided machine learning models from the University of Minnesota achieve higher accuracy in predicting floods than current physics-based methods, eliminating manual adjustments.

items.title: Deloitte Report: Physical AI Accelerating in Industrial Operations
items.summary: Deloitte's new paper highlights Physical AI's shift to large-scale deployment in manufacturing and logistics, with industrial robots as the proving ground and rapid growth projected.

items.title: Benchmark Reveals Top AI Coding Tools Fail 25% of the Time
items.summary: University of Waterloo research shows leading LLMs achieve only 75% accuracy on structured software tasks, struggling with image, video, and website generation, requiring human oversight.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: PlayStation Portal Adds 1080p High Quality Mode Today
items.summary: PlayStation Portal is receiving a new 1080p - High Quality mode on March 18, accessible via the quick menu for both remote play and cloud streaming sessions.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass March 2026 Wave 2 Adds 11 Games Including South of Midnight
items.summary: Xbox Game Pass Wave 2 for March 2026 reveals 11 new games joining soon, with South of Midnight arriving on Premium tiers across Cloud, Console, Handheld, and PC starting March 18.

items.title: Marvel Strike Force Unveils 2026 Game Vision with Gear Tier 21 and Major Updates
items.summary: Marvel Strike Force shared its Game Vision for 2026 on March 17, announcing Phase 1 with Gear Tier 21, quality of life improvements, new war screens, and a massive Phase 3 Doomsday event.

items.title: DDO Scheduled for Maintenance Downtime Today
items.summary: Dungeons & Dragons Online (DDO) servers will be down for weekly maintenance on March 18 from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM Eastern.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Intel Unveils Core Ultra 200HX Plus CPUs for High-End Gaming Laptops
items.summary: Intel has launched the Core Ultra 200HX Plus series, including the flagship Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus and Core Ultra 7 270HX Plus, featuring an Intel Binary Optimization Tool to boost native game performance.

items.title: Nvidia Restarts H200 Chip Manufacturing for China Shipments
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang announced the company is resuming production of H200 chips for export to China, with orders already received from multiple customers.

items.title: Linux Foundation Secures $12.5M in Grants for FOSS Maintainers
items.summary: The Linux Foundation received $12.5 million from Google and other Big Tech firms to support open-source maintainers dealing with increased security findings.
